languages.text: Старинное устройство выглядит чрезвычайно сложным. Судя по ржавчине на некоторых частях, его уже давно не используют в полную силу.
The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.
languages.original_text: Старинное устройство выглядит чрезвычайно сложным. Судя по ржавчине на некоторых частях, его уже давно не используют в полную силу.

traits.locale_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.
The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.
The antique device seems hopelessly broken. It has not been switched on in centuries.
The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.
The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

languages.text: そのアンティークの装置は、どう見ても壊れているようだ。何世紀にもわたって電源が入っていない。
languages.original_text: The antique device seems hopelessly broken. It has not been switched on in centuries.

languages.text: Bu antika cihazın tasarımı, karmaşık ve akıl sır ermez. Bazı parçalarındaki pasa bakılırsa bir süredir tam kapasite kullanılmıyormuş.
languages.original_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

traits.locale_text: Bu antika cihazın tasarımı, karmaşık ve akıl sır ermez. Bazı parçalarındaki pasa bakılırsa bir süredir tam kapasite kullanılmıyormuş.

languages.text: 这台古老装置的设计精密且深奥难测。从某些部件上的锈迹来看，它已有很长一段时间没有全力运转过了。
languages.original_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

traits.locale_text: 这台古老装置的设计精密且深奥难测。从某些部件上的锈迹来看，它已有很长一段时间没有全力运转过了。

languages.text: Das Design dieses alten Geräts ist kompliziert und undurchschaubar. Dem Rost auf einigen Teilen nach zu urteilen, wurde es seit geraumer Zeit nicht mehr genutzt.
languages.original_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

traits.locale_text: Das Design dieses alten Geräts ist kompliziert und undurchschaubar. Dem Rost auf einigen Teilen nach zu urteilen, wurde es seit geraumer Zeit nicht mehr genutzt.

languages.text: Cet appareil antique est à la fois complexe et insondable. À en croire la rouille présente sur certaines pièces, il n'a plus été utilisé pleinement depuis un bon moment.
languages.original_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

traits.locale_text: Cet appareil antique est à la fois complexe et insondable. À en croire la rouille présente sur certaines pièces, il n'a plus été utilisé pleinement depuis un bon moment.

languages.text: El diseño de este antiguo dispositivo es complejo e inescrutable. A juzgar por el óxido de algunos elementos, lleva mucho tiempo sin usarse completamente.
languages.original_text: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.

traits.locale_text: El diseño de este antiguo dispositivo es complejo e inescrutable. A juzgar por el óxido de algunos elementos, lleva mucho tiempo sin usarse completamente.
